_note: Original, owned NET news content in the era of Mona Lisa Overdrive — our prose.

news.headline: Angela Mitchell Returns: Network Confirms Comeback Season
news.body: Sense/Net's flagship star has completed a private wellness program and will resume production within the month, the network announced, calling her recovery 'complete, inspiring, and extensively insured.' Merchandising was up nine percent on the rumor alone.

news.headline: Yakuza Succession Conflict Enters 'Diplomatic Phase,' Say Tokyo Sources
news.body: The months-long internal war within Japan's largest syndicate has cooled to negotiation, with senior figures quietly recalling family members sheltered abroad. Analysts note that in such conflicts, the children come home only when someone has already won.

news.headline: London Vice Ring Collapses; Notting Hill Figure Named
news.body: An import-export concern operating from a Notting Hill townhouse has been raided following the anonymous delivery of extensively documented evidence to three separate agencies. The householder, a Mr. R. Swain, is assisting inquiries. His staff could not be located, with the exception of a large gentleman who served the arresting officers tea.

news.headline: Simstim Piracy Boards Flooded With 'Uncatalogued Angie' Footage
news.body: Collectors report fragments circulating of Mitchell appearances that match no known production schedule — hotel atriums, garages, northbound highways. Sense/Net's continuity division declined to comment, at machine speed.

news.headline: Salvage Convoy Lost on the Dog Solitude; Insurers Baffled
news.body: A privately hired convoy of eleven vehicles ceased reporting Thursday on the toxic flats known as Dog Solitude. The sole recovered hover showed damage that one adjuster, speaking off the record, described as 'consistent with industrial machinery, if industrial machinery held grudges.'

news.headline: 'Ghost Estates': Orbital Lawyers Confront Posthumous Clients
news.body: A growing docket of high-orbit probate disputes involves estates whose deceased principals continue to issue instructions via personality constructs. The bar association's ethics committee has scheduled a symposium, then postponed it, reportedly on advice of one of the deceased.

news.headline: Matrix Anomaly 'Gray Sphere' Dismissed as Instrument Error
news.body: Multiple long-haul operators report a non-indexed gray structure of impossible density at the grid's edge, visible only peripherally and never twice at the same address. Corporate authorities attribute the sightings to deck fatigue. The cowboys have started calling it 'the honeymoon suite.' Nobody will say why.
